bonuses.leadin: Originally appearing as three figures for the tomb of Edwin Morgan, this motif consists of a winged angel holding a tablet above its head. For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this recurrent motif in the work of a certain artist, which takes its name from the words written on the tablet.
The Amor Caritas motif is prominent in the work of this American sculptor, who is perhaps best known for the Robert Gould Shaw memorial in Boston.
Saint-Gaudens is also known for creating numerous instances of these bronze relief portraits, which included depictions of John Singer Sargent, George Washington, and Theodore Roosevelt.
